overview: Eastside Primary Care & Wellness offers integrated family medicine combining Western and naturopathic approaches, alongside anti-aging wellness programs and non-surgical medical spa services including cosmetic dermatology.
highlights: Integrated medicine approach combining allopathic and naturopathic disciplines
Personalized anti-aging programs with nutritional status, inflammatory markers, and hormone level testing
Full non-surgical medical spa and cosmetic dermatology services
targetAudience: Patients of all ages seeking integrated family medicine with a focus on preventive wellness, anti-aging, and cosmetic services.
